yoga.benefit: Instantly lowers core body temperature by 2-3 degrees.
yoga.uae_context: Crucial for high-humidity months in Dubai (July-Sept).

yoga.benefit: Resets the nervous system and reduces lower-limb edema.
yoga.uae_context: Perfect for recovery after standing shifts or long DXB flights.

endurance.detail: Inhale for two steps, exhale for two steps. Prevents side-stitches by stabilizing the diaphragm.
endurance.uae_context: Maintains oxygen saturation during heat-stressed runs.

smoking_cessation.detail: 4s inhale, 4s hold, 4s exhale, 4s hold. Mimics the deep lung expansion of a puff to trick the brain into calm.
smoking_cessation.science: Stimulates the Vagus nerve to release dopamine naturally.

dental_hygiene.detail: Rinsing with salt-water/baking soda after dates or coffee to neutralize acid.
dental_hygiene.benefit: Stops enamel erosion from high-sugar local diets.

fat_reduction.detail: Adding ginger and turmeric to Arabic coffee to boost metabolism.
